meta.title: ESL Placement Assessment
meta.description: Ontario ESL level placement for secondary school students

intake.title: Student Information
intake.subtitle: Please answer the following questions before starting the assessment.

schoolingYears.label: How many years of school have you completed (in any country)?

intake.privacy: Your information is stored securely and used only for placement purposes.

report.title: Placement Result
report.speakingNote: Speaking was not assessed in this session.

ESLAO.name: ESL Level 1 (ESLAO)
ESLAO.description: Introduces basic English skills for everyday communication. Students will learn simple sentence patterns, read short adapted texts, and write phrases and short sentences.

ESLBO.name: ESL Level 2 (ESLBO)
ESLBO.description: Extends listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills. Students read adapted texts, expand grammar knowledge, and write connected paragraphs.

ESLCO.name: ESL Level 3 (ESLCO)
ESLCO.description: Builds skills for a variety of everyday and academic purposes. Students give short presentations, read adapted and original texts, and write using different text forms.

ESLDO.name: ESL Level 4 (ESLDO)
ESLDO.description: Prepares students for fluent use of English in school and social settings. Students write articles and summaries, and respond critically to texts and media.

ESLEO.name: ESL Level 5 (ESLEO)
ESLEO.description: Supports the transition to college and university preparation courses. Students write essays, lead workshops, and apply independent research strategies.

Mainstream.name: Mainstream English
Mainstream.description: Assessment indicates English skills sufficient for mainstream academic courses without ESL support.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
